summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently from hydrated preflight. No shared canonical is selected. No GitHub mutations are executable from this worker result: fix, raise_pr, merge, and instant close lanes are disabled, and several PRs require maintainer or technical-correctness judgment.

Green focused behavior change with compatibility risk requires maintainer disposition; this job cannot merge or open a replacement fix.

The superseded relationship to #78456 is clear, but closing #78591 requires explicit maintainer disposition because instant close is disabled, the PR has protected maintainer signal, and unresolved review/check blockers remain.
